title: Prince's Modpack
description: PyjamaPrince's Vanilla+, Quality-of-Life, Exploration & Adventure, Ambience, Performance, and Fun ModPack!
body:
# Prince's Modpack
### Welcome to PyjamaPrince's Official Modpack!
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1cc75dbe52d3ad6d3b6ddcbb52b3d94f7d21c9a.png)

**_What's inside this pack?!_**
## Vanilla+ Experience
This modpack explores the Vanilla+ Experience to it's limits. Turn the visuals, sound design,  and mechanics of the game into a far better version without taking away vanilla aspects of the base game.
> THERE ARE MORE MODS THAN JUST THESE IMAGES.
![vanilla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab5999f03c1c8b86bbd776161c7ee5453a806f85.png)

## Quality-of-Life Mods
Adds mods that improve your experience with the game.
> THERE ARE MORE MODS THAN JUST THESE IMAGES.
![aa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10a214baab674feacd1a4ea1079ea2c1d404659a.png)

## Adventure, Exploration & Ambience
Bored of your local village or sitting in your base? Explore your world with new structures that don't differ much from vanilla! And do that with the soothing sounds of nature, and echoeing footsteps in caves! Not enough? The soundtracks are not biome based and the delay between them is gone!
> THERE ARE MORE STRUCTURES THAN JUST THESE IMAGES.
![vll](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9db6b6373b5632e12cf6dea78df418e6c626be5.png)

## Performance
Starting from release 2.0 [1.20.4], the modpack has a significant performance boost. Thanks to the mods of **_Fabulously Optimized_** and others I threw together, you can squeeze the most out of your game.
> Night
![night FPS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64284a09aac16e778c8f2623752c425579a1a26d.png)
> Day
![Day](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bce06f25645dabd3f9c32bfdd8a547dd4023297.png)

## Fun & Good Looking Resource Packs
> This is just a little bit I threw together, the game looks much better!
![pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbdccae162f2d4d6099611dbdffd5a717f71f63d.png)

## Stunning Shaders
> ![shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f2f13fa95e6a538a264db486f1a9c7ff060e923.png)


# Who is PyjamaPrince?
